# CANDIDATE: FLOOR_HOLD_EXIT_REDESIGN

**Filed:** 2026-06-18  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** exit_change  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

FLOOR_HOLD shows positive SPY-price edge but negative real-fills expectancy due to chart-stop-only (-0.99) incurring large absolute premium losses on losers that the SPY-price proxy doesn't capture. We hypothesize switching to ITM-2 strikes (reducing theta/gamma decay on loser legs) combined with a premium-stop (-20%) and +50% TP1 target will align real-fills expectancy with SPY-price edge by mitigating premature exits on adverse moves while preserving runner capture.

## Mechanism

- **Entry:** Unchanged FLOOR_HOLD trigger (SPY retesting intraday floor with bullish ribbon flip and confluence)
- **Strike:** ITM-2 put (strike_offset=-2) instead of ATM
- **Exit:** 
  - Premium stop: -20% (entry × 0.80) replacing chart-stop-only
  - TP1: +50% premium target (sell 2/3 position)
  - After TP1: runner stop moves to breakeven + $0.01
  - Runner exit: 3-min close back into EMA ribbon OR premium ≥ entry × 2.5
  - Time stop: 15:50 ET
- **Trail width:** Not applied (using fixed breakeven stop after TP1 per L24 lessons on trailing profit-lock inadequacy in strong trends)

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper ≈ 14% headline P&L (per OP-20 disclosure 1)
2. **Sample bias:** Will use 16-month SPY 5m data (2025-01-01 to 2026-05-29) with OPRA cache; overfit risk mitigated by walk-forward and OOS gates
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (will run walk-forward with IS/OOS=0.667/0.333 split post-sweep)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (will validate top-3 J days via realistic OPRA sim post-sweep)
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: ITM-2 legs may suffer larger gap risk on sharp reversals (e.g., 5/07)
   - Max drawdown: Could exceed 50% per-trade cap if ITM-2 entry premium >$3.50 at $1K account
   - Blow-up scenario: Persistent contango causing ITM-2 decay to outpace spot moves
6. **Concentration:** Will disclose top-5 days % of P&L post-sweep (target <60% to avoid L04 violation)

## Pre-merge gate

- Gym validators (v45) PASS
- Walk-forward OOS/IS Sharpe ratio ≥0.70
- Anchor no-regression: j_edge_tracker shows non-negative delta on all 7 J days
- Real-fills expectancy >0 on top-3 J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) and aggregate
- OP-21 gate: ≥3 live J-confirmed wins post-promotion

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- Based on L24/L23 lessons; requires empirical validation via sweep

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements existing FLOOR_HOLD watcher (currently WATCH-ONLY); conflicts with none in leaderboard as it modifies exit only. Does not affect anchor days if real-fills expectancy turns positive without harming winners.
